name: Cheesy Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounces condensed cream of mushroom or celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the soup, milk, and pepper.
2. Arrange alternate layers of potatoes, onion, sauce, and cheese in a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
3. Dot the top with butter; sprinkle with paprika.
4. Cover and bake at 375 degrees for 1 hour.
5. Uncover and bake for an additional 15 minutes or until done. Makes about 4 cups.
